title: The Kingdom Counts the Cost
description: On pages 10, 11, 13, 14, this part focuses on the rain returns to alabasta. With Crocodile defeated and the truth exposed, the battlefield finally begins to quiet as rain and exhaustion wash over the kingdom.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Rain Returns to Alabasta sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, Narrator, King Cobra, Smoker.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then Alabasta could have been in peace!

summary: With Crocodile defeated and the truth exposed, the battlefield finally begins to quiet as rain and exhaustion wash over the kingdom.
